title: House of the Dragon

characters.name: Rhaenyra Targaryen
characters.archetype: The named heir who shouldn't have had to fight for it. The Black queen.

characters.name: Alicent Hightower
characters.archetype: The childhood friend turned queen turned mother of the Greens. Made decisions everyone regretted.

characters.name: Daemon Targaryen
characters.archetype: Rhaenyra's uncle/husband. Chaotic, beautiful, dangerous. Matt Smith doing a lot.

characters.name: Aegon II
characters.archetype: The Greens' chosen king. Disastrous. Drank his way into a throne, lost his dragon, lost his everything.

characters.name: Aemond Targaryen
characters.archetype: One-eyed terror. Killed the wrong cousin. The fan-favorite villain.

characters.name: Helaena Targaryen
characters.archetype: The dreamer queen. Quietly the most tragic figure in the show.

characters.name: Otto Hightower
characters.archetype: The Hand. Alicent's dad. The original architect of the war.

characters.name: Criston Cole
characters.archetype: The 'I've taken a vow' knight. The literal worst.

characters.name: Corlys Velaryon
characters.archetype: Sea Snake. Wealthy old admiral. Steve Toussaint with gravitas.

characters.name: Rhaenys 'Queen Who Never Was' Targaryen
characters.archetype: Should've been queen. Became the Black council's MVP.

characters.name: King Viserys I
characters.archetype: The dad whose decision started everything. Paddy Considine cooked.

signature_quotes: I shall not have a council of cravens.
Dreams didn't make us kings. Dragons did.
I would have been your queen and ruled with grace and reason.
What is this brief mortal life if not the pursuit of legacy?
viral_moments: The funeral scene in S1 finale — Rhaenyra collapses.
Aemond losing his eye as a child (and getting Vhagar).
Daemon and Rhaenyra's wedding ceremony with the Valyrian rite.
Helaena's prophetic 'son for a son' moment.
Aegon being announced king in the Dragonpit.
Aemond chasing Lucerys on Vhagar — the storm scene that started the war.
Daemon doing... whatever Daemon did with the broker (S1).
memes: Matt Smith's various unhinged stares becoming reaction GIFs.
'Dreams didn't make us kings. Dragons did.' on every Twitter bio.
Aemond's eye patch as the universal villain look.
Sad Helaena content — 'protect Helaena Targaryen' was the show's motto.
The 'I want Aemond' line repeating across fancams.
'Targaryens are basically the Roys with dragons' takes.
off_screen_drama: Olivia Cooke and Emma D'Arcy's interview chemistry became its own show.
Casting changed mid-season for adult vs young versions of characters.
Matt Smith publicly defends 'too much sex' criticism.
Show has been compared to Succession constantly — Targaryens as the Roys.
George R.R. Martin still hasn't finished the books.
The episode lengths vary wildly (some 50 minutes, some 75).
running_jokes: Targaryens marrying their relatives — the show's love language.
Daemon doing something morally bankrupt every episode.
Criston Cole being everyone's least favorite character.
The Greens vs. the Blacks — every fan picked a side immediately.
Ewan Mitchell becoming the breakout heartthrob/villain of the year.
